seo.title: Top 10 Things to Do in Riga, Latvia
seo.description: Discover 10 must-see landmarks in Riga, Latvia. Free GPS routes, photos, and history.
seo.intro: Planning a trip to Riga? Explore the best places to visit in Riga, Latvia.
keywords: best places to visit in Riga

places.name: House of the Blackheads
places.description: A stunning, opulently decorated 14th-century landmark in the heart of Riga's old town.
places.seo_phrase: House of the Blackheads Riga | Iconic Gothic Guild Architecture

places.name: The Freedom Monument
places.description: Latvia's most sacred national monument, honoring independence, unity, and resilience.
places.seo_phrase: The Freedom Monument Riga | Symbol of Latvian Liberty

places.name: St. Peter's Church
places.description: A soaring 13th-century Gothic church offering the finest panoramic observation deck in Riga.

places.name: Riga Cathedral
places.description: The monumental seat of the Archbishop of Latvia, boasting world-renowned organ acoustics.

places.name: Riga Central Market
places.description: A massive, UNESCO-listed culinary marketplace housed in monumental vintage airship hangars.
places.seo_phrase: Riga Central Market | Historic Zeppelin Hangars Gastronomy

places.name: Latvian National Museum of Art
places.description: The premier art institution in Latvia, balancing historic grandeur with contemporary additions.

places.name: The Three Brothers
places.description: A charming trio of historic stone dwellings showcasing Riga's domestic architecture evolution.
places.seo_phrase: The Three Brothers Riga | Oldest Medieval Housing Complex

places.name: The Powder Tower
places.description: An ivy-clad medieval defensive tower standing proud at the edge of the Old Town.
places.seo_phrase: The Powder Tower Riga | Medieval Defensive Fortification

places.name: Bastejkalns Park
places.description: A peaceful public green space featuring a historic hill, narrow water canals, and floral displays.
places.seo_phrase: Bastejkalns Park Bastion Hill | Scenic Riga Canal Walk

adventure.title: Latvia Scenic Road Trip
adventure.subtitle: Explore Latvia beyond the cities — nature, coastlines, and scenic routes.

seo.title: Latvia Road Trip Adventure
seo.description: Plan a Latvia road trip with GPS stops and scenic routes.
seo.intro: Explore Latvia beyond the cities with this adventure route.

places.name: Ķemeri Bog Boardwalk
places.description: A stunning, world-famous wooden trail looping over pristine wild moss bog landscapes.
places.seo_phrase: Great Kemeri Bog Boardwalk | Sunrise Wetlands Hike Latvia

places.name: Turaida Museum-Reserve
places.description: A majestic red-brick medieval fortress towering over the lush Gauja forest valley.
places.seo_phrase: Turaida Castle Museum Reserve | Red Brick Fort Tower

places.description: The largest and most historically legendary sandstone cave cavern in Latvia.

places.seo_phrase: Sietiņiezis Cliff | White Sandstone Pillars Gauja

places.description: Evocative, partially submerged military bunker ruins directly on the sandy seashore.
places.seo_phrase: Liepāja Northern Forts | Abandoned Baltic Sea Bunkers

places.seo_phrase: Cape Kolka Kolkasrags | Clashing Seas Coastal Point
